- What is the main implementation approach?

## Validation

Please check all that apply and paste key output when relevant.

- [ ] `npm run format:check`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace --all-targets`

- [ ] `cd apps/agent-gui && npm run tauri build`
